verbGlossary.BUILDS: Assembles {target} from scope documents, sequencing activities with logic ties and durations to produce the approved baseline
verbGlossary.CALCULATES: Runs the CPM forward and backward pass to determine {target} and identify controlling activities
verbGlossary.PUBLISHES: Issues the periodic {target} to all stakeholders after statusing activities and recalculating dates
verbGlossary.MONITORS: Watches {target} consumption on near-critical paths to detect emerging schedule risk before it reaches the critical path
verbGlossary.PERFORMS: Executes a time impact analysis by inserting a fragnet into the current {target} to quantify a change event's delay
verbGlossary.REVIEWS: Examines the rolling look-ahead {target} to confirm upcoming work is properly sequenced and resourced
verbGlossary.TRACKS: {source} against baseline targets to identify {target} slippage early
verbGlossary.APPROVES: {source} on each periodic {target} after verifying progress entries and logic changes are accurate
verbGlossary.DIRECTS: Initiates and oversees recovery {target} development when the project falls behind the baseline milestone dates
verbGlossary.COORDINATES: Aligns subcontractor and self-perform crews against the look-ahead {target} to eliminate conflicts in the field
verbGlossary.SEQUENCES: Orders detail activities in the field to reflect actual construction logic, crew flow, and site access constraints
verbGlossary.STAFFS: {source} to {target}d activities based on production rates and the look-ahead window
verbGlossary.REPORTS: Collects and enters actual start, finish, and remaining duration data for in-progress activities
verbGlossary.FACILITATES: {source}Planner pull-planning session where trade foremen make reliable weekly work commitments
verbGlossary.EXECUTES: {source}performs the work defined by detail activities within {target}d duration and sequence
verbGlossary.PACES: Maintains the takt time rhythm by completing repeatable work packages within the allocated cycle duration
verbGlossary.LOGS: Records {target} changes with cause codes and narrative to maintain a defensible change tracking record
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: Classifies delays by type (excusable, compensable, concurrent) and records contemporaneous evidence
verbGlossary.PREPARES: Drafts the time extension request with supporting {target} analysis to substantiate additional contract time
verbGlossary.UPDATES: Enters the current data date and statuses in-progress activities to reflect actual field conditions
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHES: Defines key project milestones during preconstruction that become contractual {target} commitments
verbGlossary.SETS: Fixes the baseline early and late dates that all future {target} performance will be measured against
verbGlossary.LOADS: {source} to {target} activities to produce the time-phased cost baseline and cash flow curve
verbGlossary.ANALYZES: Evaluates earned {target} metrics (SPI-t, TSPI) to forecast likely completion dates and schedule efficiency
verbGlossary.EVALUATES: {source}of a time extension request against contract terms and {target} evidence
verbGlossary.SCHEDULES: Plans procurement lead times and delivery dates to align material arrivals with {target}d activity start dates
verbGlossary.EXPEDITES: {source}of long-lead items to prevent downstream {target} delays
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES: Formally accepts milestone completions on behalf of the owner, enabling downstream {target} phases
verbGlossary.AUTHORIZES: {source} {target} acceleration measures such as overtime, added shifts, or re-sequencing at premium cost
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS: Compares {target} health scores across the project portfolio to identify underperforming projects
verbGlossary.MODELS: Creates the 4D BIM model linking 3D elements to {target} activities for visual sequencing and clash detection
verbGlossary.GATES: Holds {target} activities from proceeding until required safety permits, inspections, or clearances are complete
verbGlossary.INSPECTS: Performs quality hold-point inspections at milestones before authorizing the next phase of work
verbGlossary.VALIDATES: Compares as-built {target} durations against commissioning test results to confirm system performance
verbGlossary.ARCHIVES: Stores each baseline and update version of {target} as a controlled document for audit and claims support
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: PM workload index influences the thoroughness and timeliness of {target} review cycles
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINS: {source}of control limits how many concurrent look-ahead activities can be effectively managed
